response.content:
✅ **Google Calendar is connected!**

The Google Calendar extension was installed and activated successfully, and I confirmed it works by listing your calendars:

| Calendar | Email | Access |
|----------|-------|--------|
| **EMAIL_REDACTED** (primary) | EMAIL_REDACTED | Owner |

All Google Calendar tools are now available:
- ✅ List / get / search events
- ✅ Create, update, delete events
- ✅ Find free slots
- ✅ Add attendees & set reminders

No additional auth was needed — the extension was already pre-authorized for this environment. You're all set to manage your calendar.
